steps.title: Find the shared trait
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between Sue and Big Mike. The notes give several separate facts, but the shared fact is that both specimens belong to the genus Tyrannosaurus.

steps.title: Reject one-sided details
steps.content: A discusses only Sue's museum location. B discusses only Big Mike. D compares different museums, which emphasizes a difference rather than a similarity. The effective choice names both specimens and states their shared genus. The answer is C.
